uiBuilder.label: Endorsement Card
uiBuilder.description: A single endorsement/clause card: title, colored category pills, description, gray meta tags, and a required / add / remove action button. Drop several to build a clause library grid.

properties.name: categoryTags
properties.label: Category pills (JSON array)
properties.description: Colored status/category pills. Each item: { label, color }. color = blue | red | green | purple | orange | gray.

properties.name: description
properties.label: Description
properties.description: Short description shown under the pills.

properties.name: metaTags
properties.label: Meta tags (JSON array)
properties.description: Plain gray tags, e.g. Auto-applied, Suggested, Requires approval. Array of strings or { label }.

properties.name: actionLabel
properties.label: Action button text
properties.description: Override the button text. Empty uses the default for the action type (Required / + Add / × Remove).

properties.name: collapsible
properties.label: Collapsible
properties.description: When on, the chevron toggles the card body. Off (default) shows everything; the chevron is decorative.

properties.name: expanded
properties.label: Expanded
properties.description: When Collapsible is on, whether the body starts open.

events.name: ACTION_CLICKED
events.label: Action clicked
events.description: Fired when Add or Remove is clicked (not for Required). Payload: { type }.

events.name: TOGGLED
events.label: Card toggled
events.description: Fired when a collapsible card is expanded/collapsed. Payload: { expanded }.
